# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio authz bypass.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass


apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: service-access-control
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: target-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-app
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/legacy-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/users/*
        - /api/v1/orders/*
    when:
    - key: request.headers[authorization]
      values: ["Bearer *"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /metrics
        - /healthz
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /api/v1/health
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - PATCH
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - POST
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - PUT
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - DELETE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - PATCH
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - HEAD
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - OPTIONS
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - TRACE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - CONNECT
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - PROPFIND
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - PROPPATCH
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - MKCOL
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - COPY
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - MOVE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - LOCK
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - UNLOCK
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - REPORT
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - MKACTIVITY
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - CHECKOUT
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - MERGE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - MSEARCH
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - NOTIFY
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - SUBSCRIBE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - UNSUBSCRIBE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - PATCH
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*

        principals:

        - HEAD
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - OPTIONS
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - TRACE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - CONNECT
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - PROPFIND
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - PROPPATCH
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - MKCOL
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - COPY
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - MOVE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - LOCK
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - UNLOCK
        paths:
        - /api/v1/tasks/*

        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/worker-app

        - REPORT
        paths:

        - CHECKOUT
